Henry de Beaumont, 1st Baron Beaumont ( c. 1280 – 10 March 1340 )
memoryArtifacts.description: Henry de Beaumont, 1st Baron Beaumont ( c. 1280 – 10 March 1340 ) was an Anglo-French nobleman who made a career in England as a military and diplomat. As an adventurer he played a significant role at …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris於1270年出生在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特波奧蒙吉素-薩特時，他的父親Louis de BRIENNE51歲，母親Agnès de BEAUMONT36歲。他於1310年7月14日與Alice Comyn在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1340年3月10日在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵享年70歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿爾迪史爾笛卡爾 迪爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris于1270年出生在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特波奧蒙吉素-薩特时，他的父亲Louis de BRIENNE51岁，母亲Agnès de BEAUMONT36岁。他于1310年7月14日与Alice Comyn在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1340年3月10日在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾布臣,第一代特威茲穆爾男爵享年70岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿爾迪史爾笛卡爾 迪爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beaumont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Gilles, Gaetan, Honore, Jacques, Jean-Guy, Marcel.

English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of the five places in Normandy or several others elsewhere in France so named. The placename comes from Old French beu, bel ‘fair, lovely’ + mont ‘hill’. There are also places in England so named under Norman influence in Cumberland, Lancashire, and Essex, the last of which changed its name in the 12th century from Fulepet ‘foul pit’ to Bealmont ‘beautiful hill’; these may also have given rise to the surname. The surname is now widespread throughout England, but most common in Yorkshire. Compare Belmont .

History: Many English bearers of this surname are descended from Henry de Beaumont (died 1340), who came to England from France as a soldier, serving Kings Edward I, II, and III of England. He acquired the earldom of Buchan in Scotland by marriage. — Many American bearers of this surname are descendants of John Beaumont (1612–47), who came to North America from England in 1630. William Beaumont came from England to Cambridge MA in 1635 and subsequently moved to CT.

variants.name: Bement
meanings: English (Cambridgeshire): variant of   Beaumont  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beeman
meanings: English (Kent): occupational name for a beekeeper, from Middle English bee-man ‘bee-keeper’ (Old English bēo + mann).
Americanized form of German Biemann or of its Dutch cognate Bieman.

variants.name: Belmont
meanings: French and English (of Norman origin): variant of   Beaumont  .
Catalan: habitational name from the placename Bellmont ‘beautiful mountain’. Compare Spanish   Belmonte  .

variants.name: Baumunk
meanings: German: probably a Germanized form of a French Huguenot name Beaumont (see also Beaumont ).

variants.name: Bayman
meanings: Americanized form of German Beumann or Bäumann, variants of Baumann .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris was born in 1270, in Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, his father, Louis de BRIENNE, was 51 and his mother, Agnès de BEAUMONT, was 36. He married Alice Comyn on 14 July 1310, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died on 10 March 1340, in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, at the age of 70, and was buried in Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris est né en 1270, à Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, son père, Louis de BRIENNE, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Agnès de BEAUMONT, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Alice Comyn le 14 juillet 1310, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1340, à Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Écosse.

Er hat am 14. Juli 1310 in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland Alice Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb am 10. März 1340 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland und wurde in Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxorisが1270年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスビーウモント-スル-サルスで生まれた時，父Louis de BRIENNEは51歳，母Agnès de BEAUMONTは36歳であった。1310年7月14日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンでAlice Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1340年3月10日にスコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアブチャンで70歳で死去し，スコットランドアバーディーンシュアイアオルド ディールにて埋葬された。

ko.Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la L: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 체미e--처니

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris(이)가 1270년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 보몽-수-사르테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Louis de BRIENNE(은)는 51세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnès de BEAUMONT(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1310년 7월 14일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 Alice Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1340년 3월 10일 스컷랜드 압르디실르 버챈에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 압르디실르 드 디어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris nasceu em 1270, em Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, seu pai, Louis de BRIENNE, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Agnès de BEAUMONT, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Comyn em 14 de julho de 1310, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1340, em Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.

ru.Chemiré-en-Charnie, Sarthe, Pays de la L: чемирe-ен-чарни, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la: бомонт-сур-сарт, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris родился в 1270 г. в местности бомонт-сур-сарт, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция, его отцу по имени Louis de BRIENNE было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Agnès de BEAUMONT, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Comyn 14 июля 1310 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер 10 марта 1340 г. в местности бучань, абирдиншир, Шотландия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности олд дир, абирдиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Beaumont 4th Earl of Buchan Jure Uxoris nació en 1270, en Beaumont-sur-Sarthe, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, su papá, Louis de BRIENNE, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Agnès de BEAUMONT, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Alice Comyn el 14 de julio de 1310, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1340, en Buchan, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Old Deer, Aberdeenshire, Scotland.
